checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The execution contract now includes the required standard sections, related_issue, run_id, allowed scope, blocked scope, validations, stop conditions, merge policy, deployment policy, final report requirements, and completion rule.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: generate-studio-dashboard now renders Operator Queue HTML containing eligible task count, excluded issue #194, decision not_planned, and a recommended action instead of the unavailable fallback.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The change does not alter operator decisions, issue #194 lifecycle, digital twin work, production, secrets, billing, auth, database, dependency installation, workflow security, or deployment automation.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The helper reads local JSON files with explicit UTF8 encoding and renders HTML from repository evidence; no secrets or external APIs are introduced.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The scope manifest declares all changed files, including dashboards.ps1, studio-queue-fix.ps1, specbridge.ps1, tests, generated Studio dashboard, and governance evidence.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: CLI regression coverage now asserts the Operator Queue section, eligible count, #194 exclusion, not_planned decision, recommended action, and absence of the unavailable fallback.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub checks passed on PR #200: Foundation Validation, SpecBridge Review Gate, SpecBridge PR Review Report, and Claude Review Non Blocking.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records passed CI, merged PR #200, no deployment, remaining historical doctor warnings, and complete status.

findings.evidence: PR #200 merged at 1777306e430fee7cec45f27938cdab640d6d6f22 after all GitHub checks passed.
findings.recommendation: Use the closure evidence file and regenerated dashboards as the post-merge state of record.

unresolved_risks: Historical doctor warnings remain for older completed scopes missing closure evidence: issue-172-specbridge-trace-run-id and issue-177-repo-memory-cleanup-after-studio.
